name: Bearsden
character: Victorian sandstone villas along Milngavie Road through to newer executive homes near Bearsden Cross

name: Giffnock
character: period semis around Fenwick Road through to family homes near Rouken Glen Park

name: East Kilbride
character: new-town housing estates through to the commercial and industrial units around the town's business parks

name: Newton Mearns
character: large detached homes off Ayr Road through to newer developments around Malletsheugh

name: Glasgow East End
character: traditional tenements around Dennistoun and Parkhead through to regenerated developments near Celtic Park

name: Milngavie
character: traditional homes around Milngavie town centre through to properties along the West Highland Way

name: Glasgow City Centre
character: city centre flats and tenement conversions through to commercial and retail units across the city
